hero.description: I turn ideas into secure digital solutions. I specialize in cybersecurity, full stack web development, and process automation.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know my story and passion for technology
intro: I am a passionate professional in cybersecurity and full stack web development, with a clear vision: to build technology that not only works but also protects and empowers people.

My mission is to build robust and secure digital solutions, combining technical creativity with cybersecurity best practices. I excel at solving complex problems, optimizing systems, and integrating AI to improve efficiency and security.
